name: @seeedstudio/xiao-mcp
description: MCP server for XIAO Assistant - AI-powered XIAO development tools

scripts.pack-mcpb: pnpm install && pnpm run build && rm -rf node_modules && pnpm install --prod && cp mcpb/manifest.json manifest.json && cp mcpb/.mcpbignore .mcpbignore && cp ../../public/icon.png icon.png && mcpb validate manifest.json && mcpb pack . mcpb/xiao-assistant.mcpb && rm manifest.json .mcpbignore icon.png && pnpm install

author: Seeed Studio
